channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Eid ul Adha to be observed on May 27 after Zil Hajj moon sighting in Pakistan
item.description: The Central Ruet-e-Hilal Committee of Pakistan has confirmed the sighting of the Zil Hajj moon, declaring that Eid ul Adha will be observed on May 27 this year. The announcement was made by Maulana Ab...

item.title: Bulgaria’s Dara Makes History Winning First Ever Eurovision
item.description: For the very first time, Bulgaria don knack im own crown for the Eurovision Song Contest as Dara, 27-year-old singer, carry the win come home with her energetic performance of 'Bangaranga'. She shock ...

item.title: Ooni of Ife and Olori Mariam welcome new twin sons, second twins in two years
item.description: The Ooni of Ife, Oba Adeyeye Ogunwusi, and his wife, Olori Mariam Ajibola, don welcome twin sons, marking the second set of twins for the monarch in just about two years. Both the queen and the babies...

item.title: Cape Town warns of risks to MyCiTi bus expansion due to potential funding reductions
item.description: Cape Town’s MyCiTi bus network, widely recognised as a successful public transport system in South Africa, now faces uncertainty due to proposed national funding reforms. The potential phasing out of ...

item.title: Remembering Kay Kendall: Iconic British Actress of the 1950s
item.description: Kay Kendall was a celebrated British actress whose career, though tragically short, left a lasting impact on 1950s cinema. She gained international recognition with the 1953 film 'Genevieve,' where he...

item.title: Ouaddou: PSL Title Race Staying Open Until Final Day Benefits League
item.description: Orlando Pirates coach Abdeslam Ouaddou has expressed that it is positive for the Premier Soccer League (PSL) that his team did not secure the league title in their penultimate fixture against Durban C...

item.title: MNLF Commits to Ensuring Peaceful and Lawful BARMM Elections
item.description: COTABATO CITY — The Moro National Liberation Front (MNLF) has assured the public of its commitment to support the Commission on Elections (Comelec) in ensuring that the September 14 parliamentary elec...

item.title: EACOP Project Nears Completion as Final Stages Begin
item.description: The East African Crude Oil Pipeline (EACOP) project dey progress steadily and is now entering its final stages. Dis major infrastructure initiative, which involves Tanzania and Uganda, aims to transpo...

item.title: A Look at Iconic Films and Covers from 1960s Films and Filming Magazine
item.description: Films and Filming was a prominent British cinema magazine that ran from 1954 to the early 1990s, widely respected for its sophisticated coverage of both mainstream and art house cinema. Unlike many pu...

item.title: WHO Declares Ebola Outbreak in Congo and Uganda a Global Health Emergency Due to Bundibugyo Virus
item.description: The World Health Organization (WHO) has declared the ongoing Ebola outbreak in eastern Congo and neighbouring Uganda a public health emergency of international concern. The outbreak, caused by the rar...

item.title: Sharon Tate at the 1968 Cannes Film Festival: Iconic Beach Photographs
item.description: In May 1968, actress Sharon Tate attended the 21st Cannes Film Festival in France, where she was photographed on the beach by Jack Garofalo. Tate was there to promote the film 'Rosemary's Baby,' direc...

item.title: Pakistan Gains Global Recognition for Mediating Iran-US Ceasefire
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif has stated that Pakistan’s international reputation has significantly improved owing to its mediation between Iran and the United States following the US-Israeli attack o...

item.title: HEC introduces policy for dual, double, and joint degree programmes
item.description: The Higher Education Commission (HEC) of Pakistan has announced a new policy allowing students to pursue two degrees at the same time. This policy also covers dual, double, and joint degree programmes...

item.title: Kaye Abad shares her journey with breast cancer and celebrates recovery
item.description: Kaye Abad, a well-known Filipino actress, recently opened up about her personal health journey, revealing that she was diagnosed with breast cancer. In her heartfelt announcement, she expressed relief...

item.title: APC Releases Official Winners of Adamawa House of Representatives Primaries
item.description: The All Progressives Congress (APC) don officially announce the winners of their House of Representatives primaries for all eight federal constituencies inside Adamawa State. Ahmed Yusha’u wey be chai...

item.title: Keith and Amanda Discuss Politics, Monarchy, and Society Over Dinner
item.description: Keith, a 48-year-old medical microbiology lecturer from Leeds, and Amanda, a 67-year-old family lawyer from Doncaster, participated in a dinner designed to bridge political and cultural divides. Despi...

item.title: The Supremes: Elegance and Innovation on Stage in the 1960s
item.description: Watching The Supremes perform in the 1960s was a display of elegance, precision, and style rather than high-energy spectacle. Under Motown founder Berry Gordy's direction, Diana Ross, Mary Wilson, and...

item.title: Consolidated Bank of Kenya Seeks Qualified Kenyans for Multiple ICT, Banking and Managerial Positions
item.description: Consolidated Bank of Kenya has opened up several job opportunities across different departments, targeting qualified Kenyan professionals. The bank is inviting applications for twelve positions includ...

item.title: Siyakholwa Kuse to Make First WBC Title Defence in South Africa
item.description: Siyakholwa Kuse has made history by capturing the WBC minimumweight title, defeating Filipino boxer Melvin Jerusalem via unanimous decision at Emperors Palace. His promoter, Rodney Berman, confirmed t...

item.title: Bishop Bacani urges senators to prioritize public duty over personal loyalty in Sara Duterte impeachment
item.description: A day before the Senate could convene as an impeachment court for Vice President Sara Duterte, Novaliches Bishop Teodoro Bacani reminded senators that their primary duty is to serve the Filipino peopl...
